response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a versatile and experienced senior/staff software engineer with roughly 20 years of breadth across web, embedded, GIS, and infrastructure domains, but the role demands a director-level AI strategist with deep, recognized expertise in AI and a track record of advising enterprise customers on cloud and AI adoption. His AI-related work is limited to a single line in his current role (MCP tooling, agentic workflows at re:cinq since April 2025), with no demonstrated AI products, publications, or external recognition in the field. He holds only bachelor's degrees—no Master's or PhD in an AI-related field—and his career trajectory reflects a hands-on individual contributor path rather than the technical leadership and strategic customer-advisory profile this position requires.
strengths: ~20 years of hands-on engineering across diverse stacks (TypeScript, DLang, C/C++, cloud infrastructure, embedded), meeting the raw experience threshold
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform in active use by NGOs
Recent exposure to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, showing awareness of the AI tooling landscape
concerns: AI expertise is nascent and shallow—confined to a single role started in 2025 with no published work, recognized platforms, or prior AI product delivery
No evidence of director-level scope, strategic customer advisory, or enterprise-scale technical leadership required for this IC director role
Education stops at two bachelor's degrees with no graduate AI/ML credentials, falling short of the strongly preferred Master's/PhD requirement
